holdings.infoBox: NBCR is an equity ETF with a total of 206 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.71%, Apple at 6.45%, Microsoft at 4.48%, Alphabet at 4.43%, and Amazon.com at 3.55%.

overview.description: The Neuberger Core Equity ETF (NBCR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund provides exposure to large-cap US companies. The actively managed fund selects equity securities using a fundamental, research-driven approach. NBCR was launched on Jul 31, 2024 and is issued by Neuberger Berman.
